name: fb-affiliate/comment-bot
description: Native PHP MVC Facebook affiliate comment automation dashboard for shared hosting.

scripts.check-syntax: php -r "foreach (new RecursiveIteratorIterator(new RecursiveDirectoryIterator('.')) as $file) { if ($file->isFile() && $file->getExtension() === 'php' && strpos($file->getPathname(), DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'vendor' . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) === false) passthru('php -l ' . escapeshellarg($file->getPathname()), $code); }"
